LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT DOLORES NETHERS' MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF AMENDED COMPLAINT, VACATE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND RECALL WRIT OF POSSESSION IS DENIED. DEFENDANT SUBMITTED TO THE JURISDICTION OF THE COURT BY FILING HER DEMURRER. EVEN ASSUMING DEFENDANT SHOWED EXCUSABLE NEGLECT AND REASONABLE DILIGENCE, DEFENDANT HAS NOT SUBMITTED A PROPOSED ANSWER AS REQUIRED BY CCP 473 (B). THE REQUEST TO PRESENT ORAL EVIDENCE IS DENIED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189
